files.purpose: Top-level project package definition and scripts.
files.notes: Defines Next.js, Supabase, Vercel, and TypeScript dependencies plus dev/build/typecheck scripts.

files.purpose: Primary setup, deployment, and auth email documentation.
files.notes: Contains milestone scope, routes, auth email architecture, and setup instructions.

files.purpose: Main public homepage and highest-visibility marketing surface.
files.notes: Reference-led premium homepage emphasizing campaigns, creators, and channel use cases.

files.purpose: Public signup route entrypoint coordinating account creation and role-selection flow.
files.notes: Primary route affected by the 2026-03-25 client-side exception investigation.

files.purpose: Public login page entrypoint for password and magic-link auth.
files.notes: Hosts login, status messaging, and magic-link request UI.

files.purpose: Root app shell and metadata configuration.
files.notes: Now sanitizes NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL when building metadataBase so malformed public env values do not break app metadata parsing.

files.purpose: App-native email action confirmation route using token_hash verification.
files.notes: Handles signup, magiclink, recovery, invite, email_change, and email token verification.

files.purpose: OAuth/OTP callback handler and auth redirect coordinator.
files.notes: Works with app-native login and recovery redirects.

files.purpose: Password recovery request and update UI entrypoint.
files.notes: Supports both request and update modes.

files.purpose: Creator onboarding and profile-edit flow.
files.notes: Must remain editable after onboarding completion; do not reintroduce redirect trap.

files.purpose: Campaign onboarding and setup-edit flow.
files.notes: Must remain editable after onboarding completion; do not reintroduce redirect trap.

files.purpose: Central auth redirect helpers for login, signup, recovery, and callback flows.
files.notes: Defines safe redirect handling and app-native auth URLs.

files.purpose: Shared Supabase environment parsing for server and browser clients.
files.notes: Now trims accidental whitespace and quote wrappers so malformed public env values do not crash auth pages.

files.purpose: Client-side signup form and email/password registration flow.
files.notes: Supabase browser client is now created inside submit handling instead of during render.

files.purpose: Client-side password login form.
files.notes: Supabase browser client is now created inside submit handling instead of during render.

files.purpose: Client-side magic-link request form.
files.notes: Supabase browser client is now created inside submit handling instead of during render.

files.purpose: Client-side password reset email request form.
files.notes: Supabase browser client is now created inside submit handling instead of during render.

files.purpose: Client-side password update form for recovery flows.
files.notes: Supabase browser client is now created inside submit handling instead of during render.

files.purpose: Global marketing header and navigation shell.
files.notes: Uses the branded logo lockup and homepage design direction.

files.purpose: Global marketing footer and final trust/navigation surface.
files.notes: Should stay visually aligned with the homepage and header.

files.purpose: Shared PolitiViral logo component.
files.notes: Updated to reflect the uploaded PolitiViral mark.

files.purpose: App favicon/source icon asset.
files.notes: Uses the play-arrow plus PV brand treatment.

files.purpose: Custom auth email send hook implementation using Resend.
files.notes: Core auth email rendering/sending logic. Current live delivery is restored through a verified byoroofer.com fallback sender while politiviral.com remains blocked by the current Resend plan.

files.purpose: Example secrets file for the auth email function.
files.notes: Documents required function secrets without storing real values.

files.purpose: Logo asset used inside branded auth email templates and hook-rendered email HTML.
files.notes: Referenced by live auth templates and function secrets.

files.purpose: Milestone 1 database schema migration.
files.notes: Defines profiles, organizations, creator_profiles, campaign_profiles, trigger, and RLS.

files.purpose: Canonical current-state snapshot for PolitiViral.
files.notes: Records the live auth sender fallback, the signup client-exception root cause, and current blockers.

files.purpose: Durable record of project-level decisions and why they were made.
files.notes: Includes the temporary byoroofer.com sender fallback and the 2026-03-25 auth runtime-hardening decision.

files.purpose: Append-only reconstruction log of work completed across sessions.
files.notes: Captures the auth-email incident work plus the 2026-03-25 signup client-exception diagnosis and deploy.

files.purpose: Tracked operational and product task backlog for PolitiViral.
files.notes: Tracks the permanent sender-domain work, auth verification checklist, credential rotation, and Vercel env cleanup follow-up.

files.purpose: Durable factual knowledge registry for project conventions, infra truths, and recurring issues.
files.notes: Stores verified operational facts such as the temporary auth sender fallback, malformed Vercel env values, and the true cause of the signup crash.
